creator: xasthurii@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 191059
patch

The SSL certificate on the distcache mirrors is only valid for "pkg.freebsd.org". Users are unable to securely fetch local (or missing) distfiles as a result. Using "pkg.freebsd.org" in the Mk files will not be accepted by portmgr. Please add a valid name for these domains:

distcache.FreeBSD.org
distcache.eu.FreeBSD.org
distcache.us-east.FreeBSD.org
distcache.us-west.FreeBSD.org

The patch can then be appled in the ports/Mk directory.
